name: chanttracker
description: Hindu spiritual chant/japa tracking platform. Web + iOS + Android.

scripts.supabase:migrate: cd supabase && pnpm exec supabase migration up
scripts.supabase:seed: cd supabase && pnpm exec supabase db seed
scripts.supabase:studio: cd supabase && pnpm exec supabase start && open http://localhost:54323
